sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9940" key="a)ntizwgre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιζωγρέω</orth>, <sense id="n9940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">save alive in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:107:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
